generated_oml:
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab
instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time detection of lead vehicle for ACC system"
]
instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of vehicle speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]
instance ActuationCommandGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates actuation commands for ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path"
]
instance SaveReport : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saves current system state and data for later analysis",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance GenerateReport : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates comprehensive reports from system data",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables Adaptive Cruise Control system remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disables Adaptive Cruise Control system remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets desired speed for ACC system remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issues emergency braking command remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transfers lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance, and actuation command generation from onboard ECUs to cloud resources",
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedCalculation, ActuationCommandGeneration
]
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks through a UI with save and report generation capabilities",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualization, SaveReport, GenerateReport
]
instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote control operations such as enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and issuing emergency braking commands for operators and developers to monitor and troubleshoot the system",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]
instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D Visualization component for real-time display",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualization
]
instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control Panel component for remote operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]
instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for all data streams",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Transfers ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and actuation command generation to cloud resources",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor providing raw point cloud data for object detection",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawData
]
instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]
instance LiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from LiDAR sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Processes raw point cloud data to detect and track objects",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User entity with 3D Visualization and Control Panel subcomponents"
]
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin entity hosting computational services and models"
]
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin entity hosting automotive functionality and physical resources"
]
instance SystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "System environment containing User, Digital Twin, and Physical Twin entities",
    base:contains UserEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, PhysicalTwinEntity, LiDARSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from ACC Controlling FE are processed by Data Translation component for serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion, transmitted over Wi-Fi using UDP to Actuation FE for motor and steering servo actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system enforces a 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy requirement for safety-critical vehicular applications due to hardware limitations, enabling computation offloading and coordination between devices as mandated by relevant standards."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin architecture follows ISO 23247 RA with modifications, organizing software components into three entities (User, Digital Twin, Physical Twin) deployed on separate hardware. Each functional entity is implemented as individual ROS2 packages with nodes, where the Physical Twin Entity handles device communication, data pre-processing, and actuation, and the User Entity includes split subcomponents for visualization and control. System-wide coordination is maintained through ROS2 inter-process communication."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within ROS2 network; inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi network with UDP transport layer protocol."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliant with ISO 23247 standard, Part 2 (Reference Architecture), defining an entity-based structure including Observable Manufacturing Elements (OMEs) representing physical manufacturing elements (e.g., equipment, facilities, products, personnel, processes), Data Collection and Device Control Entities for data collection and control, Digital Twin Entities for digital representation, and User Entities for user interaction (e.g., monitoring data or controlling OMEs). Each entity comprises Functional Entities responsible for specific tasks such as actuation, data transformation into human-interpretable format, and user interfacing."
]
